creator: arundel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Which tools are included exactly which you think shouldn't be? 

usr.bin/Makefile defines the following: 

.if ${MK_TOOLCHAIN} != "no" 
SUBDIR+=        ar 
SUBDIR+=        c89 
SUBDIR+=        c99 
SUBDIR+=        compile_et 
SUBDIR+=        ctags 
SUBDIR+=        file2c 
SUBDIR+=        gprof 
SUBDIR+=        indent 
SUBDIR+=        lex 
SUBDIR+=        mkstr 
SUBDIR+=        rpcgen 
SUBDIR+=        unifdef 
SUBDIR+=        xlint 
SUBDIR+=        xstr 
# XXX maybe under textproc? 
SUBDIR+=        vgrind 
SUBDIR+=        yacc 
.endif 

...so these shouldn't be included.
